query:
SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.type AS modalidade,
  ma.status,
  ma.title,
  ma.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  ap.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  ap.status AS participante_status
FROM mentor_appointments ma
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
AND ma.status != 'cancelado'
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate, ma.consultorId
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.type AS modalidade,
  ma.status,
  ma.title,
  ma.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  ap.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  ap.status AS participante_status
FROM mentor_appointments ma
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
AND ma.status != 'cancelado'
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate, ma.consultorId
LIMIT 20;
